query:
UPDATE samples SET analysis_status = ?
         WHERE id NOT IN (
             SELECT t.sample_id FROM tags t
             JOIN dimensions d ON d.id = t.dimension_id
             WHERE d.name = 'Type'
         )
         OR id NOT IN (
             SELECT t.sample_id FROM tags t
             JOIN dimensions d ON d.id = t.dimension_id
             WHERE d.name = 'Instrument'
         )
